title: choretrum glomeratum var. chrysanthum
intro: Choretrum glomeratum var. chrysanthum, also known as Golden Choretrum, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of limonoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Golden Choretrum include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable plant in the treatment of various health conditions. Golden Choretrum can be prepared for medicinal use through infusion, tincture, or decoction, allowing its active compounds to be extracted and utilized effectively in herbal remedies.
